name: Oversized Heart Velvet Pillow with Faux Shearling Reverse Pink/Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Surprise a loved one with a romantic setting on any occasion by using the Oversized Heart Velvet Pillow with Faux Shearling from Threshold™. This oversized pillow is designed in a heart shape with ruffles along the borders for an eye-catching presentation. It features pink velvet on one side and cream faux shearling on the other for a lovely look. Made of soft polyester fabric with polyester filling, this reversible pillow is finished with a sewn seam closure.


Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
